questions.questionText: 彼女は損害<u>賠償</u>を請求する訴訟を起こした。
questions.explanation: 賠償 is read as ばいしょう (baishou), meaning 'compensation' or 'damages'.

questions.questionText: 地震の影響で道路が切断され、復旧の＿＿＿＿＿＿。
questions.explanation: 復旧のめどが立たない means 'there is no prospect for restoration'. めどが立つ means 'there is a prospect/hope (for completion)'.

questions.questionText: あの先生は教え方＿＿＿＿＿＿、面倒見もいい。
questions.explanation: AもさることながらB means 'A is a matter of course, but B is also...'. Therefore, 'not only is their teaching good, but they are also caring'.
